result:
**Goal: Add a real-time minimap overlay that shows a zoomed-out view of the entire simulation grid in a corner of the screen, toggled with a key, so users can see global patterns while zoomed in — working across all simulation modes.**

This is the highest-impact next feature because it enhances *every* existing mode rather than adding mode #62 to an already massive collection of 61+. When users zoom into interesting local dynamics, they currently lose sight of the big picture. A minimap solves this and is a staple of any serious simulation/visualization tool.

Shall I implement it?
